name: Improper Restriction of XML External Entity Reference
description: The product processes an XML document that can contain external entity references resolving to URIs outside the intended control sphere, allowing attackers to read local files, perform server-side request forgery, or cause denial of service.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides XML data that flows to a TRANSFORM[xml_parser] node configured to resolve external entities without a CONTROL node that disables DTD processing, external entity expansion, or restricts entity resolution to trusted sources
